name: kage
description: Kage: a framework for collaborative agent memory.

plugins.name: kage
plugins.description: Git-native memory your team's coding agents read and write together: reviewed in the same PR as the code, checked against what it cites. Rejects hallucinated citations at write time, withholds deleted/expired memory on recall, and warns when your diff invalidates team knowledge. Includes /kage:scan Truth Report and /kage:gains receipts.
